sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified with the full video-editor Vitest module suite and `npx tsc --noEmit`. `usePollSync.test.ts` exercises the full `editSeq/savedSeq/isSaving/pendingOps` matrix: when `isSaving=false`, the extracted gate matches the previous blacklist decisions; when `isSaving=true` and the other idle conditions are met, polls are intentionally rejected as `saving`, which is the approved default-reject tightening for this phase.
